levels.title: Basic Vocabulary
levels.learningObjective: Match simple words to familiar pictures.

levels.title: Colours & Shapes
levels.learningObjective: Recognise common colour and shape words.

levels.title: Family & School Words
levels.learningObjective: Read common family and classroom words.

levels.title: Simple Sentences
levels.learningObjective: Choose words that complete simple sentences.

levels.title: Grammar Basics
levels.learningObjective: Notice simple nouns, verbs, plurals, and sentence rules.

levels.title: Matching & Categorising
levels.learningObjective: Group words by meaning and use.

levels.title: Reading Practice
levels.learningObjective: Read short sentences and answer meaning questions.

levels.title: Forest Guardian English Challenge
levels.learningObjective: Review letters, sounds, words, sentences, and early reading.
